text:
Teddy Rick is a fascist teddy bear-version of Rick Sanchez who also speaks German.

 lives in a universe populated by teddy bear-like creatures, where a fascist regime called "BR" is controlling America, of which he appears to be a veteran. Like many other versions of Rick, he launched his own "Operation Phoenix" in case of his untimely death. Rick (C-137)'s backup accidentally got uploaded to Teddy Rick's clone and was greeted by his teddy counterpart, who immediately asked him in German if he was fascist. Rick (C-137) immediately took his own life to be uploaded to another universe where fascism was not the norm.

sources.title: Fascist Teddy Bear Rick’s Clone API record
